name: deepwork
description: Native DeepWork extension and skills for Pi CLI

scripts.check: npm run check:package && npm run typecheck && npm run test
scripts.check:package: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8')); if (pkg.name !== 'deepwork') throw new Error('package name must be deepwork'); const required=['extensions','skills','prompts']; for (const key of required) { if (!pkg.pi?.[key]?.length) throw new Error('pi.'+key+' is required'); for (const p of pkg.pi[key]) { if (!fs.existsSync(p)) throw new Error('missing '+key+' path: '+p); } } console.log('package manifest OK');"
